title: Hi, I am Yixuan Yang
text:
Startup Entrepreneur | 3D Artist | Project Manager | Multimedia Specialist | Data Analyst






About Me




I am a former owner of a business that hosted in-person Murder Mystery Games, an animator who worked on the game Yolked at Hard Boiled Studio, and a current MS student in Global Marketing Management at Boston University.
I have a BS degree in Animation from Drexel University, and I have a passion for creating engaging and immersive experiences for different audiences, using a variety of skills and tools, such as Marketing Technology, 3D creation tools, and post-processing.
I am motivated by the challenge and opportunity to create innovative and captivating products and projects that can reach and delight a global audience. I believe I can bring diverse perspectives and experiences to the team, as well as a strong work ethic and a creative mindset.




Projects


Project 1

Exploration on how job seekers can position themselves effectively given changes in hiring trends, salaries, AI adoption, remote work, and gender-based employment patterns. Link to project






Project 2
The analysis on Sunset Part, New York. PDF file




Project 3
Yelp Review Scraping on JP Licks in Boston and Centiment Analysis. PDF file

title: Projects
text:
A mix of data analysis, backend engineering, and automation systems built during graduate study and entrepreneurial ventures.



Type: Data Analysis / Machine Learning | Tools: Python, R, Quarto, sklearn
Group research project exploring how job seekers can position themselves effectively given changes in hiring trends, salaries, AI adoption, remote work, and gender-based employment patterns. Covers data cleaning, EDA, NLP text analysis, and ML methods on real job posting datasets.
View Live Site | GitHub




Type: Backend Microservice | Tools: Python, FastAPI, SMTP/IMAP, Railway
A lightweight Railway microservice that bridges a database sheet to freight brokers via email. Sends quote requests, tracks replies over IMAP, and writes results back to the database — fully automated.
Key endpoints: POST /send-quote, POST /fetch-replies, GET /health
GitHub




Type: Automation System | Tools: Node.js, n8n, Railway, WeCom API
End-to-end quote automation pipeline: a WeCom bot receives messages via long-link SDK, a Railway bridge routes them to n8n, and n8n applies configurable pricing rules from Excel and returns a quoted price — all without human intervention.
GitHub




Type: Infrastructure / DevOps | Tools: Node.js, Railway
A minimal always-on reverse proxy that forwards WeCom enterprise callback traffic (URL verification and message events) to an n8n webhook, keeping enterprise integrations clean and decoupled.
GitHub




Type: Learning Portfolio | Tools: Mixed (varies by week)
A weekly series of build exercises covering a range of engineering and data topics.
GitHub







Sunset Park, New York — Urban Analysis
A data-driven neighborhood analysis project.
PDF Report



JP Licks Yelp Sentiment Analysis
Yelp review scraping and sentiment analysis on a Boston ice cream shop.
PDF Report
